title: Intel Jumps 8%, AMD Rises 4% on Bank of America’s $170 Billion Server-CPU Call
full_text: Shares of Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) are up 8% to $115 and change in early Thursday trading, while Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) stock is rising 4% to $470. Both chip names are rebounding after a rough stretch earlier this week. The catalyst is a bullish Bank of America research note projecting the total addressable market for server ...
